Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class DeltaProcessor

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.DeltaProcessor
public class DeltaProcessor extends Object
This class is used by RodinDBManager to convert IResourceDeltas into IRodinElementDeltas. It also does some processing on the RodinElements involved (e.g. closing them).
